summary: Tested OpenRouter LLM integration and Cartesia TTS integration. Backend endpoints verified. Model dropdown and voice engine tabs confirmed present. Found critical bug: clicking voice engine tabs resets 'Enable Speech' toggle due to stale aiProfile closure in setAIProfile calls.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking any Voice Engine tab (Browser/Async/ElevenLabs/Cartesia) while 'Enable Speech' is temporarily enabled resets the toggle back to its previously-saved value (false by default). This makes Cartesia tab content (voice list + custom input) unreachable unless the persona was previously saved with Enable Speech=ON.

action_items: FIX: Voice Engine tab onClick handlers must include current local aiCanGenerateSpeech state in setAIProfile spread. Currently: setAIProfile({ ...aiProfile, voiceProvider: 'cartesia' }) — Fix: setAIProfile({ ...aiProfile, voiceProvider: 'cartesia', aiCanGenerateSpeech: aiCanGenerateSpeech }). Same fix needed for Browser, Async, ElevenLabs tabs at lines ~1502-1537 in AIProfileScreen.tsx.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (AIProfileScreen.tsx line 1502-1537): Voice Engine tab onClick handlers call setAIProfile({ ...aiProfile, voiceProvider: X }) which spreads the context aiProfile (with aiCanGenerateSpeech: false default). This triggers useEffect at line 283 ([aiProfile] dependency) which resets local state aiCanGenerateSpeech back to false. FIX: Add aiCanGenerateSpeech to each setAIProfile call in tab handlers.
The default persona has aiCanGenerateSpeech: false (line 475), so the bug is immediately noticeable. The Enable Speech toggle turns off as soon as user clicks any tab.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (Voice Engine tab interaction broken due to state reset bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: Node.js/Express+Vite at port 3000. Python FastAPI proxy on 8001. POST /api/tts/cartesia returns 500 for bad key (confirmed). POST /api/chat with openRouterKey+model returns 400 for bad key (confirmed). UI: Model dropdown shows all OpenRouter models (GPT-4o, Llama 3.3 70B, etc.) + Custom OpenRouter input - all working. Settings screen has data-testid='openrouter-api-key-input' and 'cartesia-api-key-input'. The critical bug: Cartesia tab can't be tested because Enable Speech resets when any tab is clicked. Once that bug is fixed, verify: 9 Cartesia voices show (Barbershop Man, Helpful Woman etc.) + custom voice ID input + Use button. Use data-testid='cartesia-voice-{id}' and 'cartesia-custom-voice-id-input' for tests.

rca_of_issue.bug: Enable Speech resets when Voice Engine tab is clicked
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Voice Engine tab onClick handlers call setAIProfile({ ...aiProfile, voiceProvider: X }). The spread uses aiProfile from context which has aiCanGenerateSpeech: false (default). This updates the context, which triggers useEffect([aiProfile]) at line 283, which calls setAiCanGenerateSpeech(aiProfile.aiCanGenerateSpeech ?? true) = false, resetting local Enable Speech state.
rca_of_issue.affected_lines: AIProfileScreen.tsx lines ~1502-1537 (tab onClick handlers) and line 269 (useEffect that resets state)
rca_of_issue.fix: In each Voice Engine tab onClick: setAIProfile({ ...aiProfile, voiceProvider: 'X', aiCanGenerateSpeech: aiCanGenerateSpeech })
